checks.description: YAML must have only workflow_dispatch trigger, no PR/push/schedule.
All jobs must have guard checking confirmation phrase.
fast and safety jobs must guard on stage_selection input.
execute_mode input must be present with plan_only default.
all_pr, fast, safety plan-only runs must return pending (no actual test run).
safety execute smoke must complete within timeout without errors.
backend-unit-tests.yml and lint-check.yml must not be modified.
runtime/, action_queue/, audit_trail/ must not be created by CI run.
